hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && echo "$file" | grep -qvE 'node_modules|.next|scripts/'; then npx eslint --no-warn-ignored --max-warnings 50 "$file" 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE 'prisma/migrations/'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not modify migration files directly. Use prisma migrate dev to create new migrations.'; exit 2; fi
